title: Man in the Field: The Life and Art of Jim Denevan
original_title: Man in the Field: The Life and Art of Jim Denevan
overview: In this graceful study of the balance between solitude and community, artist and chef Jim Denevan roams across the US, transforming landscapes into breathtaking, sustainable dining experiences framed by ephemeral installation art.
